title: onobrychis elata
intro: Onobrychis elata, also known as Persian clover, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis elata include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Onobrychis elata can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
